result.markdown: --- title: "Week 12: Review" --- ::: {.cell} ::: ## Tutorial exercises - Complete Exercises 1-7 from [Section 10.7 of the book](https://otexts.com/fpp3/dynamic-exercises.html). - [Tutorial learning objectives](tute-lo.qmd). - [Week 12 Tutorial Solution.html](Tutorial12Solution.html){download="Week 12 Tutorial Solution.html"} ## What you will learn this week * Review Assignment 1 * Announce winner of the forecasting competition * Discuss exam ## Pre-seminar activities Catch up on any exercises not yet done ## Slides for seminar Download pdf ## Post-class activities * Do any exercises not yet finished. * Complete past exams: [[2022](Exam2022.pdf)] [[2023](Exam2023.pdf)] [[2024](Exam2024.pdf)] * Exam solutions: [[2022](Exam2022_solutions.pdf)] * Re-read the textbook * Listen again to all lectures
